test_name: 041. Enquiries on Hot Air Balloon Trip

content.cn_text: [旁白]:测试3。
content.en_text: [Narrator]:Test 3.

content.cn_text: 这是雅思听力考试。
content.en_text: This is the IELTS listening test.

content.cn_text: 你将听到几段不同的录音，你需要回答关于你所听到的内容的问题。
content.en_text: You will hear a number of different recordings, and you will have to answer questions on what

content.cn_text: 内容的问题。
content.en_text: you hear.

content.cn_text: 你将有时间阅读说明和问题，并且你将有机会
content.en_text: There will be time for you to read the instructions and questions, and you will have a chance to

content.cn_text: 检查你的答案。
content.en_text: check your work.

content.cn_text: 所有录音都只播放一次。
content.en_text: All the recordings will be played once only.

content.cn_text: 考试分为四个部分。
content.en_text: The test is in four parts.

content.cn_text: 考试结束时，你将有10分钟的时间将答案转写到
content.en_text: At the end of the test, you will be given 10 minutes to transfer your answers to the

content.cn_text: 答题卡上。
content.en_text: answer sheet.

content.cn_text: 现在请翻到第一部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to Part 1.

content.cn_text: 第一部分。
content.en_text: Part 1.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一位女士打电话给旅行社询问热气球旅行。
content.en_text: You will hear a woman phoning a travel agency about hot air balloon rides.

content.cn_text: 首先，你将有一些时间查看问题1到5。
content.en_text: First you have some time to look at questions 1 to 5.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答问题1到5。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully, and answer questions 1 to 5.

content.cn_text: [杰森]:早上好，智行旅行社，我是杰森。
content.en_text: [Jason]: Good morning, smart travel, Jason speaking.

content.cn_text: [女士]:嗨，早上好。
content.en_text: [Woman]: Hi, good morning.

content.cn_text: 我看到了你们今天报纸上关于热气球旅行的广告。
content.en_text: I saw your advert in today's paper about hot air balloon trips.

content.cn_text: 听起来挺令人兴奋的。
content.en_text: It sounds pretty exciting.

content.cn_text: 我想知道费用是多少。
content.en_text: And I wonder how much it costs.

content.cn_text: [杰森]:嗯，价格可能因地点、参与人数和附加服务而异。
content.en_text: [Jason]: Well, the price may vary depending on the location, number of participants, and add-ons.

content.cn_text: 单次乘坐可能每人花费高达280英镑。
content.en_text: A single ride may cost you up to £280 per person.

content.cn_text: 但如果您选择团体预订，会有折扣。
content.en_text: But if you choose group booking, there is a discount.

content.cn_text: 而最便宜的航班是每人125英镑，适用于至少10人的团体预订。
content.en_text: And the cheapest flight is £125 each, for a group booking of at least 10 people.

content.cn_text: [女士]:哦，那还不错。
content.en_text: [Woman]: Oh, that's not too bad.

content.cn_text: 你说的附加服务是什么意思？
content.en_text: What do you mean by add-ons?

content.cn_text: [杰森]:它们是可选项目，比如飞行期间为您拍照、香槟以及坐下来
content.en_text: [Jason]: They are optional items, like taking photos for you during the ride, champagne, and sit

content.cn_text: 的飞行后早餐。
content.en_text: down breakfast after the flight.

content.cn_text: 旅程结束后，我们将为每位参与者提供一份证书。
content.en_text: Upon completing the trip, we will provide each participant with a certificate.

content.cn_text: 而且那是完全免费的。
content.en_text: And that is entirely free of charge.

content.cn_text: [女士]:我可以电话预订吗？
content.en_text: [Woman]: Can I book a ride over the phone?

content.cn_text: [杰森]:是的，那是一个选择。
content.en_text: [Jason]: Yes, that's an option.

content.cn_text: 行程前一年可以通过电话进行预订。
content.en_text: Reservations can be made one year ahead of your trip by telephone.

content.cn_text: 但要选择具体日期，您必须在线预订。
content.en_text: But to pick a specific date, you must book online.

content.cn_text: 之后会立即向您发送一封确认邮件。
content.en_text: A confirmation email will be sent to you right afterwards.

content.cn_text: [女士]:热气球能飞多高？
content.en_text: [Woman]: How high can the balloons go?

content.cn_text: [杰森]:热气球的高度受气温和燃料携带量的限制。
content.en_text: [Jason]: A hot air balloon's height is limited by the temperature of the air, and how much fuel

content.cn_text: 限制。
content.en_text: it can carry.

content.cn_text: 有记录的最高飞行高度是1,800米。
content.en_text: And the highest altitude ever recorded for a ride is 1,800 metres.

content.cn_text: 但大多数飞行都保持在300米以下。
content.en_text: But most rides stay below 300 metres.

content.cn_text: [女士]:哦，天哪，真令人印象深刻。
content.en_text: [Woman]: Oh boy, that's impressive.

content.cn_text: 单次乘坐多长时间？
content.en_text: How long is a single ride?

content.cn_text: [杰森]:平均热气球飞行时间约为一小时。
content.en_text: [Jason]: The average hot air balloon ride lasts about an hour.

content.cn_text: 整个热气球体验，包括地面准备、飞行和飞行后
content.en_text: The entire ballooning experience, which includes ground preparation, flight and post-flight

content.cn_text: 收拾和庆祝，可能需要两到三个小时。
content.en_text: packing up and celebration, may take two to three hours.

content.cn_text: [女士]:飞行时间是什么时候？
content.en_text: [Woman]: And what time are the flights?

content.cn_text: [杰森]:我们的航班通常在当天日出前一小时左右集合。
content.en_text: [Jason]: Our flights generally meet about an hour before sunrise on the day.

content.cn_text: 您将在飞行前一晚收到确切的集合时间通知。
content.en_text: You will be notified of the exact meeting time the evening before your flight.

content.cn_text: 由于天气原因，会避免夜间飞行。
content.en_text: Night flights are avoided, due to weather conditions.

content.cn_text: [女士]:好吧。
content.en_text: [Woman]: Fair enough

content.cn_text: [旁白]:在听对话的其余部分之前，你将有一些时间查看问题6-10。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions 6-10.

content.cn_text: 并回答问题6-10。
content.en_text: And answer questions 6-10.

content.cn_text: [女士]:你推荐哪个月份进行热气球旅行？
content.en_text: [Woman]: Which month do you recommend for a hot air balloon trip?

content.cn_text: [杰森]:秋季是进行这次旅行的最佳时节。
content.en_text: [Jason]: Autumn is the best time of year to take the trip.

content.cn_text: 你不仅可以从高空俯瞰树木变换的色彩，而且这也是一个很好的方式
content.en_text: Not only can you see the changing hues of the trees from above, but it is a great way

content.cn_text: 在天气变得太冷之前，与全家人共度时光。
content.en_text: to spend time with the whole family before it gets too cold.

content.cn_text: [女士]:我明白了。
content.en_text: [Woman]: I see.

content.cn_text: [杰森]:但请注意，我们的航班可能会被取消，您将在前一天通过电话收到通知。
content.en_text: [Jason]: But please note that our flight may be cancelled, and you will be notified by phone the day before.

content.cn_text: [女士]:为什么会这样？
content.en_text: [Woman]: Why is that?

content.cn_text: [杰森]:在恶劣天气条件下飞行会非常危险，比如雷暴。
content.en_text: [Jason]: It can be quite dangerous to fly under bad weather conditions, like a thunderstorm.

content.cn_text: 所以我们经验丰富的飞行员在这种情况下不会起飞。
content.en_text: So our experienced pilots will not go under such conditions.

content.cn_text: [女士]:我应该穿什么去乘坐？
content.en_text: [Woman]: What should I wear for the ride?

content.cn_text: [杰森]:我们建议穿舒适的衣服，比如夹克。
content.en_text: [Jason]: We suggest wearing comfortable clothing, like a jacket.

content.cn_text: 多层穿着总是更好。
content.en_text: Multiple layers are always better.

content.cn_text: 出于安全考虑，戴头盔也是个好主意。
content.en_text: Wearing a helmet for safety concerns is also a good idea.

content.cn_text: 不允许穿凉鞋。
content.en_text: Sandals are not permitted.

content.cn_text: [女士]:儿童或老年人可以参加吗？
content.en_text: [Woman]: Can children or older people participate?

content.cn_text: [杰森]:所有儿童必须年满9岁以上。
content.en_text: [Jason]: All children must be above the minimum age of 9 years old.

content.cn_text: 并且必须至少由一位家长或监护人陪同。
content.en_text: And they have to be accompanied by at least a parent or guardian.

content.cn_text: 然而，成年人没有年龄限制，只要他们符合健康要求。
content.en_text: However, an adult has no age limit, as long as they meet the health requirements.

content.cn_text: [女士]:具体的健康要求是什么？
content.en_text: [Woman]: What exactly are the health requirements?

content.cn_text: [杰森]:参与者必须至少身体状况良好。
content.en_text: [Jason]: Participants must at least be in fair physical condition.

content.cn_text: 例如，他们不应有严重的膝盖、臀部或背部问题，也没有近期手术或骨折。
content.en_text: For example, they shall have no significant knee, hip or back problems, and no recent surgeries or broken bones.

content.cn_text: 他们还必须在飞行期间能够独自站立一小时。
content.en_text: They must also stand unassisted for an hour during the flight.

content.cn_text: 这是整个飞行过程中所需姿势。
content.en_text: It is the required position during the whole flight.

content.cn_text: 当热气球着陆时，所有乘客都需要采取着陆姿势，双膝弯曲在身体前方。
content.en_text: As the balloon comes to land, all passengers will need to adopt the landing position, with knees bent in front of them.

content.cn_text: [女士]:这些飞行安全吗？
content.en_text: [Woman]: Are those rides safe?

content.cn_text: [杰森]:热气球公司必须持有商业热气球飞行员执照，
content.en_text: [Jason]: Hot air balloon companies are required to have a commercial balloon pilot license,

content.cn_text: 我们所有的飞行员都经过严格培训才能获准飞行。
content.en_text: and all our pilots go through rigorous training before they are allowed to fly.

content.cn_text: 这是一项相对温和的活动。
content.en_text: It is a relatively gentle activity.

content.cn_text: 然而，热气球着陆的冲击力可能会因风速等因素而差异很大。
content.en_text: However, the impact of a balloon landing can vary drastically, depending on factors like wind speed.

content.cn_text: 有时它类似于从一把小椅子上跳下的动量。
content.en_text: Sometimes it is similar to the momentum of jumping off a small chair.

content.cn_text: 如果您不能从一把小椅子上跳下，最好在预订热气球飞行前咨询您的医生。
content.en_text: If you cannot jump off a small chair, speaking to your doctor before booking a balloon flight is best.

content.cn_text: [女士]:非常感谢。我想我需要知道的就这些了。
content.en_text: [Woman]: Thank you very much. I think that's all I need to know.

content.cn_text: [杰森]:感谢您的来电。再见。
content.en_text: [Jason]: Thanks for calling. Goodbye.

content.cn_text: [旁白]:第一部分到此结束。你现在有半分钟的时间检查你第一部分的答案。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: That is the end of part 1. You now have half a minute to check your answers to part 1.

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You

The best time of year to go is in 6. _______
Flights may be cancelled because of bad weather, e.g. 7. _______
It is advised to wear a jacket and a 8. _______
There is no 9. _______ restriction for adults
Participants must be able to 10. _______ throughout the flight
